variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 11551 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 11551 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 11551 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Donaldson P140132 Air Filter, Primary Round | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 11551
variants.description: Why Choose Donaldson Air Filters? Strong, pliable gasket is compressed against the air cleaner housing to create a tight seal. • High-efficiency cellulose media performs across a wide range of heavy-duty engine applications. • Corrosion resistant, coated steel liners support media during operation and help maximize airflow. • Pleatloc™ feature ensures uniform pleat spacing and prevents media from bunching to promote longer service life.

variants.title: Mann Filter C 20 325 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 11551
variants.description: High-quality MANN-FILTER air filters for clean air intake and optimum protection for your engine, mass air flow sensor & other sensitive components / They meet requirements of modern engine technology. Highest dirt holding capacity and dirt separation efficiency, low flow resistance and high pleat stability ensure functional reliability during the entire service interval.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF1601M Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 11551
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF1601M air filtration products are designed to effectively reduce the amount of damage-causing dust and dirt particles that make their way into your equipment’s engine.  Every Fleetguard product meets or surpasses the quality and performance standards required by a new engine.
